title: FBelz Protocol
author: Opentrons
description: With this Protocol you can add lysis buffer, chloroform, and wash with Isopropanol to samples. This protocol is set up to do 384 samples across 4 different plates.
steps_raw: With this Protocol you can add lysis buffer, chloroform, and wash with Isopropanol to samples. This protocol is set up to do 384 samples across 4 different plates.
The reagent reservoir will be on slot 6
The cleaning reservoir will be on slot 9
materials_raw: Opentrons P300 multi Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
